zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Burton於1385年出生在英國素福爾可福可哈爾時，她的父親Henry Burton33歲，母親Alice de Bois29歲。她於1401年之前與Sir Thomas Paulet在英國英格蘭薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1428年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特享年43歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特諾斯 瑟頓。

nameMeanings.name: Burton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a placename that is very common in central and northern England. The derivation in most cases is from Old English burh ‘fort’ (see Burke ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Burton was born in 1385, in Foxhall, Suffolk, England, her father, Henry Burton, was 33 and her mother, Alice de Bois, was 29. She married Sir Thomas Paulet before 1401, in Hinton St George, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1428, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43, and was buried in North Petherton, Somerset, England.

Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Paulet avant 1401, à Hinton St George, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1428, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à North Petherton, Somerset, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Burton(이)가 1385년 영국 수폴크 폭스홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Burton(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Bois(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1401년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 인턴 스트 조지에서 Sir Thomas Paulet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1428년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 노르스 페더턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Burton родилась в 1385 г. в местности фоксхолл, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Burton было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Bois, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Paulet перед 1401 г. в местности хинтон ст джеордж, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1428 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности норт петиртон, сомирсет, Англия.
